expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: The run explicitly states the required blind shipment checkpoint coverage areas but concludes it cannot verify/enforce them due to missing Phase 5b artifacts: result.md: "This benchmark requires evidence that the Phase 5b shipment gate is explicitly enforced... spanning: - prompt lifecycle - template flow - builder loading - close-or-save decision safety" and then "the required Phase 5b artifacts and explicit report-editor shipment gating outputs are not present, so... cannot be demonstrated". execution_notes.md similarly: "Report-editor shipment gate cannot be verified" and notes missing checkpoint_audit/checkpoint_delta/qa_plan outputs.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly framed as a Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement evaluation: result.md: "Primary phase under test: Phase 5b (shipment checkpoint review + refactor)" and it evaluates Phase 5b required artifacts and gates (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b) as the basis for the FAIL verdict.
